silver_bullet.research_note: Disabled live after costed BTC 15m validation: 2025 net managed expectancy -0.217593R over 13 trades; through 2026-04 partial -0.293280R over 17 trades; walk-forward gates failed.

ifvg_retest.research_note: Disabled live. Multi-year BTC/ETH 15m costed validation rejected both CE and opposite-boundary stops: raw OOS/late expectancy stayed negative, while a 0.20R execution-cost cap reduced the sample to 4 and 5 trades. See research/ict/58_ifvg_15m_cost_geometry_rejection_2026-06-08.md.

ict2022_mss_fvg.research_note: Prepared as session fallback, but disabled live after BTC 5m/15m May-Jun smoke produced zero events; retest may occur after sweep/MSS session if target was not reached first.

turtle_soup.research_note: Disabled for live execution. The older directional SMT-on-sweep candidate failed independent costed validation. The BTC/ETH 15m+30m non-SMT stability candidate is separated into configs/paper_model_filters_turtle_soup_stability_minrisk25_2026.json for paper/shadow validation only.

breaker_block.research_note: Disabled live pending costed validation: current filters selected zero activated BTC trades in the available 1h and 30m validation artifacts; walk-forward gates cannot pass.

reclaimed_ob.research_note: Disabled live pending costed validation: the 2025 strict 4h probe left one activated BTC trade under live filters at -0.001597R net; walk-forward gates cannot pass.

rejection_block.research_note: Research-only after NotebookLM spec; extended costed ETH 1h strict baseline remained negative at -0.087709R net expectancy (PF 0.816027) over 39 activated trades after gate-count correction.
